result:
30/30 tests passing. The implementation adds these commands to the existing v1 base:

- **`status`** — lists staged files or `(none)`
- **`diff <c1> <c2>`** — compares file lists between commits, reporting Added/Removed/Modified
- **`checkout <hash>`** — restores working directory files from a commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`reset <hash>`** — moves HEAD without touching working directory
- **`rm <file>`** — removes a file from the staging index
- **`show <hash>`** — displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent

The key change to support all commands was rewriting `parse-commit` to also extract the `files:` section (using last-space splitting for robustness), while remaining backward-compatible with the existing `log` command.
